data.title: What Happened With Jet.AI Stock Today?
data.description: Jet.AI shares fell Thursday after the company announced that it has entered into an agreement with certain institutional investors to purchase approximately 26.6 million shares of common stock in a registered direct offering.

The healthcare technology sector is undergoing a transformation, with companies leveraging AI, telemedicine, and digital platforms to innovate the way care is delivered. As demand for more efficient and patient-centric solutions grows, several public companies have emerged as leaders in this space.
